mvw.build_command: install.sh if apt-get+sudo, else pip install --user deps + antlr generation
mvw.input_scale: 1 program per PPS (Stan, Edward, Pyro), config max_threads=1
mvw.success_criteria: exit code 0, output dir created with summary

environment.python: python2 preferred for generated antlr code, then python3; script applies Queue-compat patch for Py3 and ensures numpy/antlr4 (pip install --user if missing).
environment.methodology: one-pass profiling; process-tree RSS peak (monitor_tree.sh), whole tree not single process; MVW actually run; multi-thread peaks captured by tree monitor.

min_hardware.summary: 2 vCPU / 2 GB RAM / 1 GB disk, no GPU. Raw process-tree peaks: build 0.0490 GB, run 0.0244 GB, disk 0.0028 GB.
